Label.class: text-xl font-black text-amber-300 uppercase tracking-wider
text-xs text-indigo-950 font-black bg-amber-400 rounded-full px-5 py-1.5 self-center mt-2 shadow-md

StackLayout.class: badge-amber rounded-full w-14 h-14 self-center mb-2 p-2

text-lg text-center font-extrabold text-indigo-100 mb-5
